steps.title: Set each factor to zero
steps.content:
A product equals zero when at least one factor equals zero, so each factor can be tested separately:
$$x+2=0$$
$$x-5=0$$
$$x+9=0$$

steps.title: Solve the factor equations
steps.content: Solving the three equations gives $$x=-2$$ $$x=5$$ $$x=-9$$ The question asks for a positive solution, so use the solution greater than zero. The answer is C.
